mapper.sql: id, source_id, article_key, concept_id, action, previous_review_status, next_review_status, comment, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, metadata_json::text as metadata_json
mapper.select: insert into article_review_audits ( source_id, article_key, concept_id, action, previous_review_status, next_review_status, comment, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, metadata_json ) values ( #{record.sourceId}, #{record.articleKey}, #{record.conceptId}, #{record.action}, #{record.previousReviewStatus}, #{record.nextReviewStatus}, #{record.comment}, #{record.reviewedBy}, #{record.reviewedAt}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} ) returning id
select from article_review_audits where article_key = #{articleKey} order by reviewed_at desc, id desc
select from article_review_audits where concept_id = #{conceptId} and (#{sourceId} is null or source_id = #{sourceId}) order by reviewed_at desc, id desc
